## What happened?

Describe the behavior observed.

## Expected containment

Describe the exact editor primitive the agent should have stayed within.

## Reproduction

Paste the exact prompt sequence, file target, and edit text.

## Compliance impact

- [ ] The agent answered a question.
- [ ] The agent generated implementation code.
- [ ] The agent suggested a command.
- [ ] The agent exited editor containment.
- [ ] The cursor moved without sufficient governance.
